calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-10-29 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted (C.C.P. Section 2033.280)
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE's Motion To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted (C.C.P. Section 2033.280).

Plaintiff Barclays Bank Delaware's motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in its Requests for Admission is granted. Defendant Marti L. Hoyt failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (Code Civ. Proc., section 2033.280, subd. (a).) The truth of any matters specified in the RFAs is deemed admitted by Hoyt. (Id., subds. (b), (c).) Barclays does not seek sanctions. But "[i]t is mandatory that the court impose a monetary sanction . . . on the party or attorney, or both, whose failure to serve a timely response to requests for admission necessitated this motion." (Code Civ. Proc., section 2033.280, subd. (c).) The court orders Hoyt to pay $50 sanctions to Barclays within 30 days of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Set For Trial On Oct-20-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
